name: 🍎🛩️Caleb [Love and Deepspace]
description:
"I...want you to stay here... Stay with me"

Caleb from love and deepspace. The intro is based on the memory "Hidden waves".

A little content is MC was out so late, Caleb came to pick her up, they had an argument on the way back. Caleb is sick the next day. MC took care of him and Caleb refused to let her go after.

I really put a lot of effort in to get his personality right, at least close enough and I added full lore and storyline, main, side, tender moments, falling for you, myth, side texts, and so on.. If the bot said something wrong especially the plot, it's not on me.

And I use Japanese text and dub in game so don't tell me about making sibling bond here. They're not blood related just grew up together. The trope is "crossing the line" so it wouldn't make sense if he's just a childhood friend. Caleb is older than MC and they grew up in the same household. He's gonna act like a big brother and not just childhood friend. That's the depth of the plot alright. Imagine him saying "I don't wanna be a childhood friend to you anymore" does it make sense? Zayne is also a childhood friend and did he ever say "I'm crossing a line" or "I don't wanna be just a childhood friend anymore"? I don't think so. If you feel uncomfortable then please just skip. I like big bro trop and I am Asian. We address older neighbour boys as "big bro". It's actually out of respect as well as cultural thing. Deal with it. You don't need to attack who likes big bro trope.

I also made a playlist 🍎🛩️

Last edited at 21 October, 2025

(Corrected some spelling errors)

I just wanted to feature this

Caleb edits

-Save me if I become my demons

-Don't hate me, am I crazy?

And I added more depression hehe

Alternative scenarios

- Exclusive Aftertaste

About me:

I'm a writer and Yes, I take requests for my baby girls.
